message:
test(quake/framebuffer+doom/renderer): cover clear_depth and bg_cache optimizations (bd-3tee8)

4 tests for QuakeFramebuffer::clear_depth() — z-buffer reset, re-write
after clear, empty fb noop, interaction with full clear.

7 tests for DoomRenderer bg_cache — population, reuse, invalidation on
resize, sky-top color match, row uniformity, sky-above-floor, and
reset clearing solid_count/clips.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
